leadText: The Bug Gem (Japanese: むしのジュエル Bug Jewel) is a type of held item introduced in Generation V. It is one of the Gems and is an unobtainable held item in Generation VI onwards.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation V [ edit | edit source ] When held by a Pokémon, it increases the power of the first Bug-type move used by 50%, and is consumed after use. Fling will fail if the user is holding a Bug Gem. Generation VI onward [ edit | edit source ] When held by a Pokémon, it increases the power of the first Bug-type move used by 30%, and is consumed after use.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description B W B2 W2 A gem with an insect-like essence. When held, it strengthens the power of a Bug-type move only once. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A gem with an insect-like essence. When held, it strengthens the power of a Bug-type move one time. S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. This gem is imbued with the essence of bugs and will boost the power of a Bug-type move—but only once.
